chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 29 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.2244/2023 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For hearing of main case 17.04.2023 Mr. Nadeem Ahmed Malik, Advocate for the applicant..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is allowed. 2 & 3. Through instant Criminal Transfer Application, the applicant/ complainant seeks transfer of Sessions Case No.108 of 2021, arising out of Crime No.01 of 2021 registered at Police Station Khan Wahan, District Naushahro Feroze under Section 302, 34, P.P.C., from the Court of Additional Sessions Judge, Kandiaro to Additional Sessions Judge, District Khairpur for earlier trial on the ground that charge was framed in the matter two years back, yet the trial Court has failed to conclude the case. At the very outset, learned Counsel for the applicant contends that he would be satisfied and will not seek disposal of instant Criminal Transfer Application on merit, if directions are issued to learned trial Court to conclude the trial expeditiously. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, learned Assistant Prosecutor General, who is present in some other matters, waives notice and after receiving the copy of instant Criminal Transfer Application states that expeditious trial is the right of the parties. Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 29 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 I, therefore, dispose of this Criminal Transfer Application by directing to learned trial Court to proceed with the matter expeditiously and conclude the trial preferably within a period of three months hereof. Instant Criminal Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms.

S – 29 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 I, therefore, dispose of this Criminal Transfer Application by directing to learned trial Court to proceed with the matter expeditiously and conclude the trial preferably within a period of three months hereof. Instant Criminal Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
